description_long: This object is a large, straight-edged knife or sword with a long, rectangular blade that tapers to a sharp point. The blade is single-edged and features a clean, angular profile with a flat spine and a sharply angled tip, reminiscent of a modern chef's knife or a minimalist sword. The handle is straight, elongated, and appears to be made from the same material as the blade, with no visible ergonomic contouring or decorative elements. The transition between the blade and handle is seamless, with no visible guard or crossguard. The entire object is a uniform dark color, likely black or dark gray, giving it a sleek and utilitarian appearance. Its size and proportions suggest it could be used as a large kitchen knife or a short sword in an urban context.
description: A large, straight-edged, black or dark gray knife or sword with a minimalist, angular blade and a simple, straight handle.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the straight blade and handle, highlighting the sharp, angular tip and seamless transition.
description_view_1: Edge-on view displaying the thinness of the blade and handle, with the pointed tip visible at the top.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, again showing the straight blade and handle with the angled tip.
description_view_3: Edge-on view from the opposite side of view 1, emphasizing the object's slim profile and pointed tip.
attribute_handle_design: straight, unadorned, likely plastic or composite, no visible grip texture
